questionHtml:
This DNA sequence was used to synthesize a polypeptide.

DNA (sense strand): 3′ T A C T G A 5′

DNA (template strand): 5′ A T G A C T 3′

Which are the bases of the tRNA (anticodons)?

A. T A C   T G A

B. U A C   U G A

C. A U G   A C U

D. A T G   A C T

meta.title: This DNA sequence was used to synthesize a polypeptide. DNA (sense strand): 3′ T A C T G A 5′ DNA (template strand): 5′ A T G A C T 3′ Which are the bases of the tRNA (anticodons)?
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.7. Complementary base pairing between tRNA and mRNA
